description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 58-61.

Level 24

Improved Incapacitating Strike

When you reach 24th level, your Incapacitating Strike’s Lethal damage is increased to 60, and the target is stunned on a failed save, or incapacitated on a successful one. If the target is immune to the stunned condition, it is impaired instead.

Primeval Burst

Also at 24th level, your critical range is increased by 1. When you score a critical hit, you can expend a 5th-level spell slot to imbue the attack with the power of the wild and deal an additional 100 points of Lethal damage. This extra damage is not doubled (or tripled) by the critical hit. If you have no 5th-level spell slots remaining, you can expend 1 Legendary Point instead.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
